title: phyllanthus pullenii
intro: Phyllanthus pullenii, also known as Cheesefruit or Madras Quince, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pullenii are attributed to its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
